summary: Corrupted recording plagued by repeated fade‑ins; no performance details available.
review: The sole reviewer reports frequent fade‑in glitches at the start of many tunes, suggesting a software error and requesting a re‑upload. No comments are made about the musical performance or setlist, leaving the show quality unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one low‑star review highlighting serious recording defects; no positive information on the show to offset the poor technical quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Frequent fade‑ins at song starts, likely software corruption; overall audio is unreliable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No information provided about setlist or performance flow.
